description.en:
​A UK style dairy cow shed with milk, slurry and manure triggers.
Original model from Oak Bridge Farm which I have made into a stand alone placeable, there's a few changes from the original model including, removing the attached slurry pit and replacing it with a smaller slurry outlet and bringing the milk tank and trigger inside the shed, so now all 4 outer walls are unobstructed for better placement. I have also removed the clutter from inside the shed.
Price: £40,000
Daily Upkeep: £20
Animal Capacity: 100 Cows
Feed: 40,000L
Milk: 30,000L
Slurry: 500,000L
Manure: 50,000L
Straw: 40,000L
:- Manure can be collected from inside the shed, either manually or using the trigger
:- Bales are accepted for feed
:- Straw must be blown in
:- Switchable lights
